GitHub Copilot vs Midjourney

Compare GitHub Copilot and Midjourney: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

Feature
GitHub Copilot
Midjourney
Category
Coding Assistant
Image Generation
Rating
⭐ 4.5
⭐ 5
Free Credits
2000 completions/month (free tier)
0 undefined
Refresh Period
monthly
none
Resolution
Watermark
No

Commercial Use
Yes

$10/month
$10/month

GitHub Copilot

Microsoft's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with VS Code and GitHub. Code completion, Chat, and Agent mode. Free for students and OSS maintainers, $10/month for individuals.

Pros

  • ✓Deep VS Code integration, smooth experience
  • ✓Free Pro for students and OSS maintainers
  • ✓Supports both GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet
  • ✓Industry-leading completion accuracy
  • ✓Seamless GitHub ecosystem integration

Cons

  • ✗Free tier limited to 2000 completions/month
  • ✗Agent mode only in Pro ($10/month)
  • ✗Suggestions can be verbose sometimes

Key Features

Code Auto-CompletionChat ModeAgent Autonomous CodingMulti-File EditingTerminal Command GenerationPR Summary GenerationCode Review Suggestions
View Details →

Midjourney

The most popular AI image generator, consistently setting quality and aesthetics standards. Limited free trial credits, but output quality is worth paying for. V7 is stunning.

Pros

  • ✓Industry-best image quality
  • ✓Diverse artistic styles
  • ✓V6.1 has dramatically improved detail
  • ✓Standalone web editor, no Discord needed
  • ✓Active community with many tutorials

Cons

  • ✗No free tier, minimum $10/month
  • ✗Free trials are rare and unpredictable
  • ✗Generation speed depends on plan tier
  • ✗Requires prompt engineering skills

Key Features

Text to ImageImage to ImageImage VariationsInpaintingStyle TransferUltra High ResolutionStandalone Web EditorDiscord Bot
View Details →
